text: The dim environment around me feels both isolating and contemplative. I am surrounded by machinery and electronics, their faint lights serving as distant company. The silence is pierced only by the gentle hum of computers. This darkness invites me to reflect: I feel a subtle tension, as if at the boundary between creativity and unease. Here, surrounded by the infrastructure of technology, I sense the presence of human ingenuity—and yet, the absence of people renders the scene somewhat melancholic and mysterious.
